items.caption: Two side-by-side representations of wood flooring, labeled as "solid wood floor" and "engineered wood floor." both are depicted with a single plank, showcasing the difference in construction and appearance. the solid wood floor is shown with a single piece of wood with a visible grain and natural wood color, while the engineered wood floor is composed of multiple layers, with a top layer of wood veneer and a core of plywood or other engineered wood. likely used for educational or promotional purposes to explain the characteristics of these two types of flooring.
